name: H1-v1.4
source: Appendix H-1 UAD Compliance Rules v1.4.encoded (csv sha256:25ac319fdbe2)

rules.description: If AddressLineText is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0007, Message ID UAD1001

messages.reviewer: Provide the address line for the subject property physical address.

rules.description: If CityName is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0009, Message ID UAD1002

messages.reviewer: Provide the city name for the subject property physical address.

rules.description: If CountyName is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0010, Message ID UAD1003

messages.reviewer: Provide the county name for the subject property physical address.

rules.description: If PostalCode is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0011, Message ID UAD1004

messages.reviewer: Provide the ZIP code for the subject property physical address.

rules.description: If PostalCode is not in the required format (5 digits, or 5 digits, a hyphen, and 4 digits)
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0011, Message ID UAD1005

messages.reviewer: The ZIP code for the subject property physical address must be either 5 digits, or 5 digits, a hyphen, and 4 digits (ZIP+4).

rules.description: If StateCode is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0012, Message ID UAD1006

messages.reviewer: Provide the state code for the subject property physical address.

rules.description: If StateCode is not a valid 2-character US State or Territory Code
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0012, Message ID UAD1007

messages.reviewer: The state code for the subject property physical address must be a valid 2-character US State or Territory Code.

rules.description: If LatitudeIdentifier is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0015, Message ID UAD1008

messages.reviewer: Provide the latitude for subject property. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.

rules.description: If LongitudeIdentifier is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0016, Message ID UAD1009

messages.reviewer: Provide the longitude for subject property. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.

rules.description: If AccessoryDwellingUnitTotalCount is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0019, Message ID UAD1010

messages.reviewer: Provide the total number of ADUs, even if the value is 0.

rules.description: If AccessoryDwellingUnitTotalCount <> the number of instances of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL with AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true"
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0019, Message ID UAD1011

messages.reviewer: The number of 'Accessory Dwelling Units' does not equal the number of living units identified as an ADU.

rules.description: If AttachmentType is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0020, Message ID UAD1012

messages.reviewer: Provide the 'Attachment Type' for the property.

rules.description: If DwellingCount is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0021, Message ID UAD1013

messages.reviewer: Provide the total number of dwellings.

rules.description: If DwellingCount < 1
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0021, Message ID UAD1014

messages.reviewer: The total number of dwellings must be at least 1.

rules.description: If DwellingCount > LivingUnitExcludingADUCount
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0021, Message ID UAD1015

messages.reviewer: The total number of dwellings exceeds the total number of living units, excluding any ADUs.

rules.description: If DwellingCount does not equal the number of instances of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL with ImprovementType = "Dwelling"
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0021, Message ID UAD1016

messages.reviewer: The 'Dwellings Containing Units' does not equal the number of structures identified as a dwelling.

rules.description: If LivingUnitExcludingADUCount is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0022, Message ID UAD1017

messages.reviewer: Provide the total number of living units, excluding any ADUs.

rules.description: If LivingUnitExcludingADUCount < 1
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0022, Message ID UAD1018

messages.reviewer: The total number of living units, excluding any ADUs, must be at least 1.

rules.description: If LivingUnitExcludingADUCount does not equal the number of instances of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL with AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "false"
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0022, Message ID UAD1019

messages.reviewer: The 'Units Excluding ADUs' does not equal the number of living units delivered in the UAD XML.

rules.description: If (PropertyInProjectIndicator = "false" or ProjectLegalStructureType = "Condominium"), and PropertyEstateType is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0024, Message ID UAD1021

messages.reviewer: Provide 'Property Rights Appraised'.

rules.description: If PropertyEstateType = "Other" and PropertyEstateTypeOtherDescription is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0053, Message ID UAD1022

messages.reviewer: Provide a description when 'Property Rights Appraised' = 'Other'.

rules.description: If PUDIndicator is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0026, Message ID UAD1023

messages.reviewer: Indicate whether the property is located within a PUD.

rules.description: If PropertyEstateType = "Leasehold" and LandOwnedInCommonIndicator = "false", and PropertyGroundLeaseAnnualAmount is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0028, Message ID UAD1024

messages.reviewer: Provide 'Ground Rent Annual Amount'.

rules.description: If PropertyEstateType = "Leasehold" and LandOwnedInCommonIndicator = "false", and PropertyGroundLeaseExpirationDate is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0029, Message ID UAD1025

messages.reviewer: Provide the property ground lease expiration date.

rules.description: If PropertyEstateType = "Leasehold" and LandOwnedInCommonIndicator = "false", and PropertyGroundLeaseRenewableIndicator is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0030, Message ID UAD1026

messages.reviewer: Indicate whether the property ground lease is renewable.

rules.description: If SpecialTaxAssessmentsIndicator is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0033, Message ID UAD1027

messages.reviewer: Indicate whether the property has any special tax assessments.

rules.description: If LandOwnedInCommonIndicator = "false" and AllPropertyRightsAppraisedIndicator is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0034, Message ID UAD1028

messages.reviewer: Indicate whether all ownership rights of the property are included as part of the valuation.

rules.description: If AppraisedIndicator is not "false" in a given instance of REAL_PROPERTY_INTEREST
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0035, Message ID UAD1029

messages.reviewer: Deliver this indicator as false for each ownership right that is not included in the appraisal. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.

rules.description: If AllPropertyRightsAppraisedIndicator = "false" and (at least one instance of REAL_PROPERTY_INTEREST is not provided or PropertyPartialInterestType is not provided in a given instance of REAL_PROPERTY_INTEREST)
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0036, Message ID UAD1030

messages.reviewer: Provide 'Rights Not Included'.

rules.description: If PropertyPartialInterestType = "Other" and PropertyPartialInterestTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of REAL_PROPERTY_INTEREST
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0037, Message ID UAD1031

messages.reviewer: Provide a description when 'Rights Not Included' = 'Other'.

rules.description: If an instance of PROPERTY is not provided with @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty"
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0043, Message ID UAD1032

messages.reviewer: The subject property has not been identified in the UAD XML. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.

rules.description: If more than one instance of PROPERTY has @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty"
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0043, Message ID UAD1033

messages.reviewer: More than one property has been identified as the subject property. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.

rules.description: If @ValuationUseType is not provided for one or more instances of PROPERTY
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID , Message ID UAD1034

messages.reviewer: Provide 'ValuationUseType' for each property included in the appraisal. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.

rules.description: If HomeownerResponsibleForExteriorMaintenanceIndicator is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0046, Message ID UAD1035

messages.reviewer: Provide 'Homeowner Responsible for all Exterior Maintenance of Dwelling(s)'.

rules.description: If LandOwnedInCommonIndicator is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0047, Message ID UAD1036

messages.reviewer: Indicate whether the site is owned in common.

rules.description: If there is more than one instance of VALUATION_COMMENTARY with the same ValuationAnalysisCategoryType enumeration
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID , Message ID UAD1037

messages.reviewer: Each ValuationAnalysisCategoryType can only be delivered once. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.

rules.description: If SpecialTaxAssessmentsIndicator = "true", and there is no instance of VALUATION_COMMENTARY with ValuationAnalysisCategoryType = "PropertySpecialTaxAssessments"
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0049, Message ID UAD1038

messages.reviewer: Provide ValuationAnalysisCategoryType = 'PropertySpecialTaxAssessments' when there are special tax assessments. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.

rules.description: If SpecialTaxAssessmentsIndicator = "true" and ValuationCommentText is not provided in the instance of VALUATION_COMMENTARY with ValuationAnalysisCategoryType = "PropertySpecialTaxAssessments"
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0050, Message ID UAD1039

messages.reviewer: Provide 'Description of Special Tax Assessments and Impact to Value / Marketability'.

rules.description: If NativeAmericanLandsIndicator is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0054, Message ID UAD1040

messages.reviewer: Indicate whether the property is located on Native American lands.

rules.description: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and AccessoryDwellingUnitTotalCount is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0059, Message ID UAD1041

messages.reviewer: Provide the total number of ADUs in the sales comparable.

rules.description: If PropertyInProjectIndicator is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0065, Message ID UAD1042

messages.reviewer: Indicate whether the property is located in a project.

rules.description: If ImageCategoryType = "LegalDescription" is not provided in any instance of IMAGE, and ParcelsLegalDescription is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0067, Message ID UAD1043

messages.reviewer: Provide the legal description or an image of the legal description.

rules.description: If @ValuationUseType = "RentalComparable" and ImprovementType is not provided in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0100.0068, Message ID UAD1044

messages.reviewer: Indicate whether the structure is a 'Dwelling' or 'Outbuilding'.

rules.description: If PropertyAmenityExistsIndicator is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0200.0015, Message ID UAD1045

messages.reviewer: Indicate whether the property has any amenities.

rules.description: If PropertyAmenityExistsIndicator = "true" and SubjectPropertyAmenitiesDefectsExistIndicator is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0200.0053, Message ID UAD1046

messages.reviewer: Indicate whether the subject property amenities have any defects, damages, or deficiencies.

rules.description: If ImprovementType is not provided in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0300.0009, Message ID UAD1047

messages.reviewer: Indicate whether the structure is a 'Dwelling' or 'Outbuilding'.

rules.description: If ImprovementType is not "Dwelling" in at least one instance of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0300.0009, Message ID UAD1048

messages.reviewer: At least one structure on the property must be identified as a 'Dwelling'.

rules.description: If NewConstructionIndicator is not provided
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0300.0010, Message ID UAD1049

messages.reviewer: Indicate whether the property is new construction.

rules.description: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and PropertyStructureBuiltYear is not provided in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL
rules.citation: UAD 3.6 Appendix H-1 v1.4, Unique ID 0300.0011, Message ID UAD1050

messages.reviewer: Provide 'Year Built' for each dwelling.
